author: Gustavo de Aguiar Martins

interpretation.boundary: Generated timestamps, temporary paths and non-semantic ordering are intentionally excluded from comparison.
interpretation.purpose: Regenerate PNVA evidence reports with current tools and compare stable fields against the published evidence package.
interpretation.sovereignty: A public PNVA release is stronger when its claims are reproducible from source commands, not only stored as static JSON.

recommendations: Run reproducibility after semantic consistency and before checksums.
Treat any command failure or stable-field drift as a release-blocking error.
Keep reproducibility outside the evidence attestation hash seed because it consumes the attestation.
